user_prompt: Analyse this data write a word report

source_data_summary.ground_truth: Planted: South/Product_B March Revenue 22,216 (41% drop). Organic: South/Product_E Aug Revenue 20,000. Data quality: 8 missing Revenue, 5 missing Units_Sold. 1 row unresolvable: Nov/South/Product_D both fields missing.

agent_plan: Prepare to analyze Excel data, focusing on revenue and units, addressing missing values and outliers.

steps.output: 216 rows × 5 columns. Revenue: 8 missing. Units_Sold: 5 missing. 12 rows with at least one missing field. 1 row with both missing: Nov/South/Product_D.

7 Revenue rows imputed, 4 Units rows imputed, 1 row unresolvable. Post-imputation total revenue 8,297,952. North leads (35.6%). Product_A leads (20.2%). 2 pricing anomalies: South/Product_E Aug (Unit_Price 194.17, robust_z=-111.86), South/Product_B Mar (Unit_Price 233.85, robust_z=-37.86).
key_facts_produced: anomaly_1: Aug | South | Product_E | Unit_Price 194.17 | robust_z=-111.86
anomaly_2: Mar | South | Product_B | Unit_Price 233.85 | robust_z=-37.86

steps.output: 3 charts generated. All computed facts, imputation results, anomaly findings, and missing value table passed into Word context.
8-section report plus appendix. Dedicated data quality section with missing rows table. Imputation methodology in appendix.
Narrative explicitly addresses data quality as primary section. Both anomalies named. Unresolvable row named specifically. Imputation methodology referenced.
key_facts_produced: exec_summary: Total revenue (imputed) 8,297,952. 8 missing Revenue, 5 missing Units imputed. 1 row unresolved: Nov/South/Product_D.
data_quality_narrative: Revenue imputed for 7 rows, Units for 4 rows using median unit price. 1 row unresolvable.
recommendation_3: Fix upstream processes — Revenue and Units cannot both be blank.

facts_produced_in_excel_step2: missing_summary: 8 Revenue, 5 Units, 7 imputed, 4 imputed, 1 unresolvable

word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: Total revenue (imputed) 8,297,952 across 33,065 units. 8 missing Revenue, 5 missing Units imputed using median unit price. 1 row unresolved: Nov/South/Product_D.
word_output_actual_text.anomaly_section: South/Product_E Aug: Revenue 20,000, Unit_Price 194.17. South/Product_B Mar: Revenue 22,216, Unit_Price 233.85.
recommendations: Fix upstream processes to prevent missing Revenue/Units fields.
